title: viola × kalksburgensis
intro: Viola × kalksburgensis, also known as the Kalksburg violet, is a hybrid plant species that belongs to the viola genus. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing due to its high content of flavonoids and glycosides. The health benefits of Viola × kalksburgensis include its potential to alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia, and its antioxidant properties may help protect against cell damage. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, and it can be dried and used in herbal supplements or capsules.
